docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AN DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APPLE, INC. THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF REGARDING CHOICE OF HEARING DATES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT APPLE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
